tags.title: Tags
tags.tagInstructions: Press Enter or click Add button to add a new tag. Click the X button to remove tags.

managementSOP.missionStatementDesc: The mission statement is displayed at the top of the SOP page and in the agreement overlay. Define your department's mission, values, and M.O.S. requirements.
managementSOP.selectCategory: Select a category to manage its sections
managementSOP.noSectionsYet: No sections yet. Add one below.
managementSOP.introductionDesc: This introduction is shown to officers when they are required to acknowledge the SOP. Use it to summarize key policies and expectations.
managementSOP.noCategoriesYet: No categories yet. Add one below.
managementSOP.publishingWillIncrementVersion: Publishing will increment the SOP version and require all officers to re-acknowledge the SOP before they can access the MDT.
managementSOP.confirmPublishWarning: Are you sure you want to publish a new version of the SOP? All officers will be required to re-acknowledge the SOP before they can access the MDT.

managementPermissions.bossNote: Boss roles have all permissions enabled

managementLicenses.stateLicenses: State licenses (Driver's License, Weapon License) are managed by the core framework. Create custom licenses below that officers can grant or revoke from citizen profiles.

managementLicenses.noCustomLicenses: No custom licenses configured. Add one above.
